g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Layer 3 result aggregator output?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a B-Rep feature graph for PyTorch Geometric?')
sendPrompt('How does PointNet++ consume mesh point clouds for feature recognition?')
sendPrompt('How do I export a trained PyTorch model to ONNX format?')
sendPrompt('How should trained ONNX models be versioned and stored?')
sendPrompt('How do I run inference with ONNX Runtime on a CAD feature graph?')
sendPrompt('What does a process-aware classifier output for a machined feature?')
sendPrompt('How should confidence scores and process context be structured for Layer 5?')
sendPrompt('How should deterministic rule fallbacks work alongside ML predictions?')
sendPrompt('What does the Layer 4 ML output bus contain for Layer 5?')
sendPrompt('What would Layer 5 do with ML feature labels and process tags?')
